data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when simulating the persona's actions. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete results or traces from the simulation that confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The lack of specific evidence regarding the tracking of sessions and remaining hours leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No concrete evidence showing the outcome of the simulated persona scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add simulation outcome verification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define explicit checks to verify the outcome of the persona scenario simulation.
